reasoning: The control PM-31-c focuses on continuous monitoring of organizationally-defined metrics, which can be mapped to Kubernetes through audit logging and monitoring of network policy changes. Kubernetes audit logs can be configured to capture API server access and other critical events, similar to cloud logging services. Additionally, monitoring changes to network policies can be achieved through logging and alerting mechanisms. These mappings ensure ongoing visibility and monitoring within a Kubernetes environment.
title: Continuous Monitoring Strategy - Ongoing monitoring of organizationally-defined metrics...
